69.reason: [Sorting the input array destroys the original insertion order needed to correctly traverse the BST in-order for leaf output; leaf nodes must be output in left-to-right (in-order) traversal of the constructed BST, not sorted order]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Sorting the input array destroys the original insertion order needed to correctly traverse the BST in-order for leaf output; leaf nodes must be output in left-to-right (in-order) traversal of the constructed BST, not sorted order]
